text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning. First, I drink a glass of water and do light stretching. After a quick shower, I have breakfast—usually oatmeal with fruit—and then I leave for work by 8:00. My work schedule is consistent: I start at 9:00 and spend most of my day in meetings or writing reports. At lunchtime, I take a 30-minute walk to refresh my mind. After work, I go for a run or do yoga three times a week. Evenings are for relaxing: I cook dinner, read a book, or watch a show. By 10:30, I'm in bed. This routine keeps me balanced and productive.
